zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Fitzgerald Dillon於1258年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼時，他的父親Lord Henry Dillon26歲，母親Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare22歲。他於大約1280年與Bridget De Birmingham結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1343年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Fitzgerald Dillon于1258年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 維斯特亞斯德盧姆藍尼时，他的父亲Lord Henry Dillon26岁，母亲Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare22岁。他于大约1280年与Bridget De Birmingham结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1343年在他的家乡享年85岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Irish, and French: from the Norman French personal name Dillon, arising from the ancient Germanic Dillo (of uncertain origin, perhaps a byname from the root dil- ‘destroy’).
English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded in 1138 as Dilun, probably from Old English dīglum, dative plural of dīgle ‘settlement at the shady or secret places’.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duilleáin ‘descendant of Duilleán’, a personal name, a variant of Dallán meaning ‘little blind one’.

variants.name: Delon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Michel.
French: from a short form of the personal name Adelon, from ancient Germanic Adelo, a pet form of compound names formed with the element adel ‘noble’.

variants.name: Dillion
meanings: Irish and English: possibly a variant of   Dillon  .

variants.name: Dillow
meanings: English: habitational name from Dilwyn in Herefordshire, recorded as Delewe in 1295 and Dylewe in 1334. Compare Dillon 2.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: Fitzgerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is a patronymic from the personal name Gerald formed by the addition of the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Fitzgerald Dillon was born in 1258, in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Ireland, his father, Lord Henry Dillon, was 26 and his mother, Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, was 22. He married Bridget De Birmingham about 1280. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Fitzgerald Dillon est né en 1258, à Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlande, son père, Lord Henry Dillon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Bridget De Birmingham environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Fitzgerald Dillon 1258 in Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Henry Dillon 26 und seine Mutter Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare 22. Er hat um 1280 Bridget De Birmingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 85 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Fitzgerald Dillon è nato il nel 1258 nel Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, il suo padre, Lord Henry Dillon, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Bridget De Birmingham circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Fitzgerald Dillonが1258年にアイルランドコウントイ ウエストメアスドルムランエイで生まれた時，父Lord Henry Dillonは26歳，母Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildareは22歳であった。約1280年にBridget De Birminghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1343年に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Fitzgerald Dillon(이)가 1258년 아일랜드 카운티 웨스트미스 드럼랜이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Henry Dillon(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1280년 Bridget De Birmingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1343년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Fitzgerald Dillon nasceu em 1258, em Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, seu pai, Lord Henry Dillon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Bridget De Birmingham aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Fitzgerald Dillon родился в 1258 г. в местности друмрани, коунти вестмит, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Lord Henry Dillon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Bridget De Birmingham около 1280 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Fitzgerald Dillon nació en 1258, en Drumraney, County Westmeath, Irlanda, su papá, Lord Henry Dillon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Olivia Fitzgerald of Kildare, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Bridget De Birmingham aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1343, en su pueblo, a la edad de 85 años.
